learnings: Lower-bound edge split: edge_lcb<0 trades netted $-13.02 (17 trades) vs edge_lcb>=0 at $-14.48 (19 trades).
NO side: 16/35 won, net $-27.00 this window.
YES side: 0/1 won, net $-0.50 this window.
Profile split: live 3/7 won ($-1.49); research 13/29 won ($-26.01). Judge each gate set on its own book; research-profile losses are expected data-collection cost.
Most frequent gate rejections: edge (10656x); model/market gap (4947x).
Clean next-day forecast error averaged 2.61F across 6 settled day(s) in this window.
recommended_changes: Window ROI is materially negative on a fair sample; audit the largest losers for a shared failure mode before the next change.
Mean absolute forecast error is 2.61F; review source weights and recent Google/NWS disagreement before trusting tail bins.
